description: Create a content slide on near-term risk priorities with a horizontal bar chart on the left, explanatory text in the middle, and a highlighted insight card on the right.

header.headline: Near-term risk priorities – cyber leads, while strategic and interconnected risks rise

left.title: Figure 1: Over the next 12 months, what are the top five risks that will require the most attention from the CRO?

center.body: Beyond cyber, the broader CRO agenda has remained largely stable across third-party risk, regulatory- and compliance-related risks risk and core financial exposures (credit, market and interest rate risk). This pattern suggests CROs are managing technology-driven threats alongside more traditional balance sheet and market risks – often in combination rather than isolation.

right.body: Highlighted insight card with supporting visual illustration.
